medical_history.chief_complaint: fever, chest pain, shortness of breath
medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Presented after developing left side SSCP while receiving Velcade infusion for multiple myeloma. Described 15 minutes of new onset chest pain, with generalized weakness and falling x 3 earlier in the day. Had a fever yesterday and this morning, but was afebrile at the time of his transfusion. Developed a fever, cough, and chest discomfort during blood transfusion, raising concern for transfusion reaction.
medical_history.past_medical_history:
- Multiple myeloma - long standing, failed alkeran/prednisone, started on velcade
- CLL
- CAD s/p left LAD stent
- Atrial fibrillation
- Sick sinus syndrome s/p PPM placement
- COPD (not on home O2)
- Bladder ca s/p resection
- Infrarenal AAA and renal aneurysm
- H/o PE
- CRI (baseline creatinine 2.0)
- Hyperlipidemia

physical_examination.general_examination: Vitals: 97.7 89 89/52 24 94%3L -> 89%RA. Alert, oriented, no acute distress. Poor air movement bilaterally in lungs, no ronchi, wheezing, few crackles at bases.
physical_examination.specialty_examination: Regular rate, normal S1 + S2, no murmurs, rubs, gallops. CXR showed bibasilar opacity, likely atelectasis.
